---
title: "How to Fit a xsdm model"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{How to Fit a xsdm model}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---


- 📄 [Download the PDF](howToFit.pdf)

<iframe
  src="howToFit.pdf"
  width="100%"
  height="900px"
  style="border: none;">
</iframe>
